title: mirabilis prostrata
intro: Mirabilis prostrata, also known as creeping four o'clock, is a perennial plant species in the four o'clock family (Nyctaginaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and acting as an antiseptic. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which can help protect against infections and promote overall well-being. Mirabilis prostrata can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
